name: Dream Time
description: NAKED BATH OIL: A small but mighty brick of luxurious cocoa butter to moisturise your skin and all the most calming oils we could think of.
archive_note: Dream Time naked bath oil is a Kitchen exclusive that fits within Lush's growing sleep and relaxation product family, using a naked/solid format to reduce packaging
nostalgia_angle: Naked bath oils are a fan-favourite Kitchen format, and Dream Time resonates deeply with those who love Lush's sleep-focused range and the ritual of a calming evening bath
throwback_reference: A solid bath oil companion to the Sleepy and Twilight range, channelling the same calming, sleep-inducing botanical oils in a luxurious cocoa butter base
